issue_title: Add support for stating accepts/consumes metadata is required or not
pr_title: Add support for stating accepts/consumes metadata is required or not
pr_body:
<!-- Thank you for submitting a pull request to our repo. -->

**PR Title**
Add support for stating accepts/consumes metadata is required or not

**PR Description**
This PR uses  ```AcceptsMetata``` for extensions method rather ```ConsumesAttribute```

Fixes #35849
